protocol.source_commit: the commit containing the composite implementation
protocol.test_policy: compose and select on validation, then evaluate held-out test exactly once

architecture.routing: action/refinement/next-step/progress/boundary from action expert; event/state/normality outputs from event expert
architecture.reason: single-trunk transplant is feature-incompatible; two low-VRAM experts preserve both validated representations

event_adaptation.selection_constraint: strict incorrect-event recall > 0, normality AP >= validation prevalence, false alerts <= 2/min
